title: The Starter
description: A low, two-tier unit that works perfectly as a media console, entryway organizer, or low display. Built in our Nairobi workshop from steel and engineered wood, it offers a sturdy foundation you can always expand later.

title: The End Table
description: A versatile two-tier unit that works perfectly as a side table, bedside shelf, or entryway organizer. Keep your books, crafts, and daily essentials within easy reach.

title: The Low Console
description: A versatile three-tier unit designed to sit comfortably in entryways, living rooms, or under windows. Perfect for keeping books, art, and everyday essentials beautifully on display.

title: The Triple
description: A versatile three-tier configuration in an earthy sage green. It makes a perfect low sideboard or hallway console for organizing books, baskets, and daily essentials.

title: The Quadruple
description: A four-tier unit in a striking deep blue finish. Designed to showcase your collection of books, baskets, and handcrafted pieces beautifully.

title: The Lighted Console
description: A three-tier modular unit featuring an integrated overhead lamp. Bring warmth and organized storage to your favorite reading corner. Note: lamp shade not included.

title: The Wide Four-Tier
description: A spacious four-shelf unit finished in soft coral. Designed to give you plenty of horizontal room for organizing books, toys, and creative displays.

title: The Multicolor Stack
description: A vibrant five-tier unit that brings a playful mix of color to your home. Perfect for showcasing books, art, and your favorite collections.

title: The Lantern Shelf
description: Combines spacious multi-tier storage with an integrated overhead lamp arm. Perfect for casting a warm, cozy glow over your favorite books and curated displays. Note: lamp shade not included.

title: The Two-Tone Stack
description: A six-tier modular configuration in a vibrant navy and coral mix. Perfect for displaying books, baskets, and collected treasures while adding a bold pop of color to your space.

title: The Versatile Stack
description: A tall seven-tier unit in a calm sage green finish. Designed to offer maximum vertical storage for your books, baskets, and art while keeping a clean, slim footprint.

title: The Stepped Stack
description: An asymmetric, stepped design that offers plenty of shelving at varying heights. Perfect for showcasing a mix of books, art, and larger collectibles.

title: Dynamic Corner
description: Turn that forgotten corner into the most interesting part of your space.

title: The Curator's Shelf
description: Features asymmetrical shelf heights that create unique pockets for books, art, and hanging decorations. Built from steel and engineered wood in our Nairobi workshop.

title: The Offset Shelf
description: An asymmetrical, multi-level configuration that pairs a tall tower with a lower side unit. Perfect for displaying art, books, and plants at varying heights to create a dynamic focal point in your space.

title: The Wardrobe Shelf
description: Combines an integrated hanging rail with two spacious lower shelves for baskets, books, or folded clothes. Built from steel in our Nairobi workshop to keep your space organized and airy.

title: The Deep Stack
description: A tall, five-tier shelving unit finished in a calming sage green. Its deep profile makes it perfect for displaying books, baskets, and collectibles in smaller spaces.

title: The Double Bay
description: A spacious ten-shelf setup that offers plenty of room for your books, crafts, and collectibles. The double-width design makes a bold statement in any living room or creative studio.

title: The Stepped Display
description: Combines low-level shelving with a tall display stack in a striking asymmetric design. Perfect for showing off books, art, and your favorite collections.

title: The High-Low
description: Pairs a low-slung console with a tall shelving tower for a striking asymmetrical look. Perfect for displaying books, baskets, and art at different heights.

title: The Stepped Duo
description: Combines a low three-tier unit with an extra-tall stack for a playful, dynamic silhouette. Perfect for organizing colorful baskets, books, and your favorite art pieces.

title: The Triple Bay
description: Three connected columns offer generous, easy-to-reach storage while keeping a low profile. Perfect for organizing books, baskets, and toys in any living space.

title: The Grand Corner
description: A generous seven-tier configuration designed to turn any corner into a beautiful focal point. Built in our Nairobi workshop to hold a massive collection of books and more.

title: The Bookend
description: A neat clamp-on bookend for keeping rows of books upright and tidy on your Framework shelf. It can be attached to any of our shelf units except the trimmed configurations.
